characters.name: Aunt Polie-Anna
characters.description: Aunt Polie-AnnaInformationFull nameAunt Polie-AnnaSpeciesRobotRelativesPappy Polie(older brother)Percy Polie(nephew)Gizmo Polie(nephew)Polina Polie(niece-in-law)Olie Polie(grandnephew)Zowie Polie(grandniece)Coochie(adopted grandniece)Coo(adopted grandnephew) Aunt Polie AnnaisPappy's younger sister. She‘s the great aunt ofOlie,Zowie,CoochieandCoo, the aunt ofGizmoandPercyand the aunt-in-law ofPolina. Whenever she hugs people her stomach jiggles and makes the hugger dizzy. When Zowie first met her, she was scared of her but not for very long. Everyone loves her. She is a minor character in the series and one of the tritagonists ofThe Baby Bot Chase. Ant Polie-Anna andPappyonce took a cruise in outer space but accidentally got sucked into awormhole. As a result, Aunt Polie-Anna and Pappy got separated. Pappy made it back to planet Polie, but Aunt Polie-Anna was stranded in space until she was able to build a raft to come home. She is cheerful, happy and always in a good mood.
characters.personality_section: She is cheerful, happy and always in a good mood.

characters.name: Aunt Rhombus
characters.description: Aunt Rhombusis an unseen character. She is Billy's aunt, but it is unknown which parent's sister, or which parent's brother's wife, she is. Billy only mentions her sometimes.

characters.name: Baxter Bevel
characters.description: Baxter Bevelis the father ofBilly BevelandBinky Bevel. He is also the husband ofBonita Bevel. He is also very close friends with the Polie family. He has a high pitch voice and a surprisingly deep, goofy laugh. He is one of the three pentagonists ofRolie Polie Olie, and one of the tritagonists ofThe Great Defender of FunandThe Baby Bot Chase. Baxter is square man, he has black hair, glasses with green lens, and he wearing a red blazer jacket and a blue shirt.

characters.name: Benchy
characters.description: Benchyis a bench that can be found inPollievile Park. He is usually found siting by Trashy, a yellow and white trash can. He is shown as a large, gray and orange bench with an antennae, two eyes, a black nose, and a black mouth. In seasons 4, 5, and in some episodes of season 6, his mouth is straight, while in other episodes of that season, he is shown with other expressions.

characters.name: Billy Bevel
characters.description: Billy BevelInformationFull nameBilly BevelGenderMaleSpeciesRobotPersonalityFriendly, kind, optimistic, fun-loving, excitable, energeticAppearanceSquare shaped robot with a green diamond on his chestOccupationStudent atSchool in PolievilleRelativesBinky Bevel(younger brother)Baxter Bevel(father)Bonita Bevel(mother)Aunt Rhombus (aunt)[1]PetsDicey(cat)AlliesOlie,Zowie,Space Boy,Space Dog,Pollie Pi,Wheelie,Screwy,Gloomius MaximusEnemiesScrewy,Gloomius Maximus(both formerly)LikesSpending time with his family.Hanging out with Olie.Playing with his bongo drums.Trips to planet cubey.DislikesGetting teased or bullied by Screwy.[2]Getting in trouble.Binky disturbing him.Getting Magnetitus.[3]Seeing Olie get hurt.Being left out.First AppearanceLast Appearance"Monster Movie Night""Babies Go Home" William "Billy" Bevel, the deuteragonist ofRolie Polie Olie, isOlie's next-door neighbor and best pal, the oldest child ofBaxterandBonita, and big brother ofBinky Bevelwho is part of the Bevel Family, a family that is cubed-shaped robots. and is about the same age as Olie. He is voiced by Joshua Tucci and later Kristopher Clarke in Season 6. Billy is a yellow square robot who wears seemingly nothing but orange pants. (Simmilar to Olie) He has a green rhombus on his chest, and his antenna has a blue beacon in the shape of a cube.

He is voiced by Joshua Tucci and later Kristopher Clarke in Season 6. Billy is a yellow square robot who wears seemingly nothing but orange pants. (Simmilar to Olie) He has a green rhombus on his chest, and his antenna has a blue beacon in the shape of a cube.

characters.name: Binky Bevel
characters.description: BinkyisZowie'sbest friend andBilly's baby brother. He was 1 years old starting in Season 2. He turned 2 onBinky's Birthdayfrom the fifth season. Around seasons 5-6, he was more included playing with the older kids along with Zowie. He first introduced inBaby Binkyfrom Season 2. He is the minor character ofRolie Polie Olie, along two films:The Great Defender of FunandThe Baby Bot Chase. Binky is a toddler robot wears a diaper and has a red-colored, outie bellybutton which causes his head to spin around when it's pressed. Like Zowie, his body is down while she‘s round. Also, Zowie doesn't have her bellybutton unlike Binky. Binky is a happy, playful robot who is fun-loving, cute, and friendly. He always wants to be in the older kids' activities like Zowie, even though he cannot speak as much as Zowie since he is 1 years old in most episodes. He is very pleased and always happy. Sometimes, he and Zowie outsmart Olie and his brother Billy, like in the episodes focused on Halloween. Binky is a happy, playful robot who is fun-loving, cute, and friendly. He always wants to be in the older kids' activities like Zowie, even though he cannot speak as much as Zowie since he is 1 years old in most episodes. He is very pleased and always happy. Sometimes, he and Zowie outsmart Olie and his brother Billy, like in the episodes focused on Halloween.

characters.name: Bogey Bot
characters.description: Bogey Botis episodic character seriesRolie Polie Olie. The heroine of the nightmareZowie Poliein the episodeSoupy Zowie and Diaper Dyma-No. He Looked LikeBinky BevelBut His Skin Is Turquoise With Purple Ears With An Purple Belly Button, bigger eyes And Purple Diaper With Legs And Arms And Also With The Pajamas Hat On His Head He resembles Binky and although he is considered scary, he is really lonely and timid. Zowie was scared of Bogey Bot, but once she met him in a dream, she realizes his true characteristics and befriends him.

characters.name: Bonita Bevel
characters.description: Bonita Bevelis the mother ofBilly BevelandBinky Bevel. She is the wife ofBaxter Bevel. She is also very close friends with the Polie family. She was voiced byEllen Ray Hennessy. She is one of the three pentagonists ofRolie Polie Olie, and one of the tritagonists ofThe Great Defender of FunandThe Baby Bot Chase. Bonita is a square bot woman, she has tall black hair with hair clips in it. She wears a black and white striped shirt and a red vest that exposes her tummy.  She has a simlar personality to her husband. She also likes to dance, which was seduced in the episode ofScrewy, when she danced withMrs. Triangle..
characters.personality_section: She has a simlar personality to her husband. She also likes to dance, which was seduced in the episode ofScrewy, when she danced withMrs. Triangle..

characters.name: Bot-Ler
characters.description: Bot-Leris a robot that only appeared inOlie's Bot-ler. Food processor that replaces human, bringing in among others various dishes and helpingOlieclean up the yard. He was also responsible for cleaning the wholeHousey.

characters.name: Chef Rotundo
characters.description: Chef Rotundois an episodic hero of theRolie Polie Olieseries. He prepares food forPolievilleresidents. He was voiced by the lateLen Carlson.

characters.name: Chili
characters.description: Chili the refrigerator is a side character located in the kitchen area. He is an old style off white fridge with gold detailing including a head accessory that resembles a hat, a handle, and a rim surrounding a blue mouth. Like every other appliance he is mute but he can make sounds like when his door opens and closes and sometimes he even snores when he's sleeping. He appears in most episodes standing next toToastyHis name was first confirmed inPappy Dayswhen he was scared of the storm. LikeTellyandMouseyhe got his own episode titledChili's Cold. As the name suggests he catches a cold (Which is revealed to be caused because of his power cord being unplugged for some unknown reason) and the family tries to help him get better. He also has several different mouth plates such as a happy smile, a sad frown, and a shocked o mouth which changes in different scenes depending on what's happening. There is a consistency error ens e his door opens from different sides. For example inUniversal Spothis door opens from the right but inChili's Coldhis door opens from the left. He andTrayare guilty of feedingCooinThe Baby Bot Chasewhich causes Chili to become empty within a minute or two because of Coo's appetite.

characters.name: Chunk Squarey
characters.description: Chunk Squareyis a TV star and a fan from the Polies and the Bevels. He is one of Planet Cubey's famous singers. The Polies and the Bevels got to see him a couple of times.

characters.name: Clippy Clop (character)
characters.description: Clippy Clopis a supporting horse in the television seriesRolie Polie Olie. (S)he lives on a farm. She is one of the secondary tritagonists ofThe Great Defender of Fun. Of course, in the debut episode of the same name, Clippy Clop is referred to as a female; however, in "Bots Will Be Boys," Clippy is referred to as a male.

characters.name: Clown
characters.description: Clownis a character in theRolie Polie Olieepisode Puzzle Peace. In that episode, Olie Polie and Zowie Polie were trying to complete a puzzle depicting a picture of him, but one of the pieces was missing. After it was founded by the Polies, it was put back into the puzzle, finally completing it. The Polies then decide to hang up the puzzle as a picture on the wall in their living room.

characters.name: Coo
characters.description: CooisCoochie's twin brother and is the younger twin. The twins were adopted by the Polies in The Baby Bot Chase and appeared in several episodes of the sixth season. His most favorite thing to do is play with his twin sister Coochie and his older adopted siblings Olie and Zowie. He is one of the deuteragonists ofThe Baby Bot Chase. Coo is a cute blue baby bot with big eyes, a Pair of Dark Blue helicopter blades on the top of his head, and a white diaper with yellow, pink and blue buttons. Coo is best friends with his sister, Coochie. Both twins enjoy playing with their adoptive siblingsOlieandZowie. They are very playful and mischievous. They both enjoy using their copters to fly and playing with their rattles. Both Coochie and Coo were adopted from a place out in space called theThe Mother Ship. Their first appearance is inThe Baby Bot Chase. Coo was adopted by thePolie Familyin Baby Bot Chase. Sometimes they don't like it when the adults or Olie and his friends are watching he and Coochie play but they often let them watch. Coo is best friends with his sister, Coochie. Both twins enjoy playing with their adoptive siblingsOlieandZowie. They are very playful and mischievous. They both enjoy using their copters to fly and playing with their rattles. Sometimes they don't like it when the adults or Olie and his friends are watching he and Coochie play but they often let them watch.

characters.name: Coochie
characters.description: Coochieis one of the twins that the Polie family adopted. She is one of the twins and the the other one is Coo. Coochie is the older twin. Coochie along with Coo was adopted by the Polies in the movieThe Baby Bot Chaseand appeared in a few season 6 episodes. She was voiced byJulie Lemieux. Coochie looks very similar to her brother, except she's pink instead of blue. Also she is a little taller and chubbier then Coo in some scenes. She wears a white diaper and one strand of curly pink hair. Due to the fact that she is a baby, she doesn't seem to have much of a personality, but she appears to be playful and mischivious, like her brother. She also loves thePolie Family. Her most favorite thing to do is play with her twin brother Coo and her adoptive older siblings Olie and Zowie. Due to the fact that she is a baby, she doesn't seem to have much of a personality, but she appears to be playful and mischivious, like her brother. She also loves thePolie Family. Her most favorite thing to do is play with her twin brother Coo and her adoptive older siblings Olie and Zowie.

characters.name: Dicey
characters.description: Diceyis the Bevel family's pet cat. She is often being chased bySpotandFifiand in rare instances Binky. She is orange, has two dice for her body, a square head, triangle shaped ears and a tail with a square antenna. Dicey appeals to be sassy, and prideful. She loves to steal Spot's toys and treats. She doesn't like baths like most cats and doesn't always like it when Binky tries to play with her as she usually runs away from him. There are some instances we're she is nice to Spot like in the episodeForgive And Forget Itshe gave the ball back to Spot to give to Olie. Dicey appeals to be sassy, and prideful. She doesn't like baths like most cats and doesn't always like it when Binky tries to play with her as she usually runs away from him. There are some instances we're she is nice to Spot like in the episodeForgive And Forget Itshe gave the ball back to Spot to give to Olie.

characters.name: Doctor Callinghouse
characters.description: Doctor Callinghouse is the robo-mechanic doctor that appears inTen Foot Olie. His appearance is similar toDoctor Geary. He is voiced byLen Carlson.

characters.name: Doctor Geary
characters.description: Doctor Geary Callinghouseis a doctor that appeared inThe Great Defender of Fun).  He's the Polieville doctor who formely lives on Planet Cubey and he first appeared in the episode, Ten Foot Olie on Rolie Polie Olie. He was voiced byNeil Crone.

characters.name: Doctor Geary
characters.description: Doctor Geary Callinghouseis a doctor that appeared inThe Great Defender of Fun).  He's the Polieville doctor who formely lives on Planet Cubey and he first appeared in the episode, Ten Foot Olie on Rolie Polie Olie. He was voiced byNeil Crone.

characters.name: Earth tool
characters.description: TheEarth toolis a planet found in the Galaxy of Nuts and Tools. Its design looks like theRolie Polie Planet, but in a nut shape.

characters.name: Earth tool
characters.description: TheEarth toolis a planet found in the Galaxy of Nuts and Tools. Its design looks like theRolie Polie Planet, but in a nut shape.

characters.name: Electric Kettle
characters.description: Electric KettleInformationGender(assumed) MaleAppearanceSpherical metal teapot-ish pitcher with eyes on a base with a switch and four "wheels"[1]The Electric Kettleis a character that resides in in the kitchen. His normal location is next toTeapoton the left kitchen self, right below the cabinets. He can raise himself and rotate to pour stuff in by himself. In season 1, he used to reside on the kitchen table, and sometimes the counter below his normal location. After Olie sits down for breakfast, he hops to Olie and pours some orange juice in a cup for him. He looks at Olie from above when Olie gets up and leaves (before he finishes his breakfast appearently) due to being a "later tater" for school. One shot, whileOlieis hopping through the entire kitchen, shows him moving to the beat with everything else. Another scene shows him outside on the frontyard table, surrounded by cups of lemonade. After the Polies take them all, he hops off the table, bounces on the ground, and then pours some lemonade in'sSpot'sdog bowlby raising himself to reach it from above.

characters.name: Fifi
characters.description: FifiisPollie Pie's pet poodle.Spot's girlfriend. Sometimes she meetsDicey. She loves to play with Spot and the children. She will chase Dicey as well. She speaks with an French accent. She is voiced by Susan Roman. Fifi is a pink poodle, with a blue stripe, dark pink ears, hair and heart-shaped marking on her right eye.
